title: StreamLoadResponse
description: Response returned by the Apache Doris Stream Load HTTP API after a data loading operation.

TxnId.description: Transaction ID assigned to this load job.

Status.description: Overall status of the load operation.

ExistingJobStatus.description: Status of existing job with same label if label already exists.

NumberFilteredRows.description: Number of rows filtered due to quality issues.

NumberUnselectedRows.description: Number of rows filtered by WHERE clause.

LoadBytes.description: Total data size loaded in bytes.

LoadTimeMs.description: Time spent loading data in milliseconds.

BeginTxnTimeMs.description: Time to begin transaction in milliseconds.

StreamLoadPutTimeMs.description: Time to plan the load in milliseconds.

ReadDataTimeMs.description: Time to read data in milliseconds.

WriteDataTimeMs.description: Time to write data in milliseconds.

CommitAndPublishTimeMs.description: Time to commit and publish in milliseconds.

ErrorURL.description: URL to retrieve error details when rows are filtered.
